title: frangula capreifolia var. capreifolia
intro: Frangula capreifolia var. capreifolia, also known as the Goat's Leaf or Goat's Rue, is a plant species in the Rhamnaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its laxative effects, due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides such as emodin and aloe-emodin. The health benefits of Frangula capreifolia var. capreifolia include treating constipation, digestive issues, and certain skin conditions, as well as being used as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Frangula capreifolia var. capreifolia include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
